description: Integrate a newly acquired company's employees and IT assets into Snipe-IT and complete the organizational merger by reassigning assets to the parent company. Create companies 'TechVantage Solutions' and 'NovaBridge Consulting'. Establish the 'NovaBridge - Austin Office' (500 West 2nd Street, Austin, TX, 78701, US). Register three users for 'NovaBridge Consulting' using password 'Snipe-IT123!': Rachel Chen (rchen, rchen@novabridge.com), Marcus Webb (mwebb, mwebb@novabridge.com), and Priya Kapoor (pkapoor, pkapoor@novabridge.com). Add four 'Ready to Deploy' assets to the Austin office under 'NovaBridge Consulting' using existing models: NB-001 (Laptop, SN: NB-SN-40981, 2023-08-15, $1249.00), NB-002 (Laptop, SN: NB-SN-40982, 2023-08-15, $1249.00), NB-003 (Laptop, SN: NB-SN-40983, 2024-01-20, $1999.00), and NB-004 (Printer, SN: NB-SN-40984, 2023-03-10, $329.00). Assign NB-001 to Rachel Chen, NB-002 to Marcus Webb, and NB-003 to Priya Kapoor. To finalize the merger, update the company field for all four assets (NB-001 through NB-004) to 'TechVantage Solutions'.
